headline: Trump eyes "historic" China summit as Xi welcomes Hormuz reopening
summary: Investing.com -- President Donald Trump has signaled that a high-stakes meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping is imminent, suggesting that the summit could be "historic" as both nations coordinate on the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and regional energy security.
